summary: A professional website for a data analyst, showcasing services offered as a full-service data analyst.
architectural_notes: Single-page or multi-section website (HTML/CSS/JS or framework) targeting professional data analyst personal branding
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Professional abstract data visualization banner with glowing teal grid lines and floating data points on a dark navy background (hero-banner.dim_1440x600.png)
- Clean geometric data analyst profile avatar illustration with teal accents on dark background (analyst-avatar.dim_400x400.png)
- Abstract chart and graph collage thumbnail for portfolio project card 1 (project-thumb-1.dim_600x400.png)
- Abstract map and geospatial data visualization thumbnail for portfolio project card 2 (project-thumb-2.dim_600x400.png)
- Abstract bar chart and KPI dashboard thumbnail for portfolio project card 3 (project-thumb-3.dim_600x400.png)

existing_features.title: Create a Hero/Landing section with a compelling headline, tagline, and a brief introduction positioning the owner as a professional data analyst. Include a clear call-to-action button (e.g., 'Hire Me' or 'View My Work') that scrolls to the services or contact section.

Create a Services section listing all full data analyst services offered, including: Data Cleaning & Preparation, Data Visualization, Statistical Analysis, Business Reporting & Dashboards, Data Consulting, Predictive Modeling, and Database Management. Each service should have an icon, title, and short description.

Create an About Me section featuring a professional bio, a list of key skills (e.g., Python, SQL, Excel, Tableau, Power BI, R), and a tools/technologies used showcase with recognizable icons or badges.

Create a Portfolio/Projects section showcasing sample or placeholder past data analysis projects. Each project card should include a project title, short description, tools used, and a placeholder image or chart graphic.

Create a Pricing/Packages section displaying at least three service tiers (e.g., Basic, Standard, Premium) with feature lists and a highlighted recommended plan. Each tier should have a price placeholder and a 'Get Started' CTA.
Create a Testimonials section displaying at least three placeholder client reviews with a quote, client name, and company/role. Use a card or carousel layout.
Create a Contact section with a form containing fields for: Name, Email, Subject, and Message. Include a Submit button. Store submitted contact messages in the backend so they can be retrieved later.

Add a sticky top navigation bar with links to all major sections (Home, About, Services, Portfolio, Pricing, Testimonials, Contact) that use smooth scrolling. Include a logo/name on the left and a mobile hamburger menu for smaller screens.

Apply a dark, data-tech-inspired visual theme with a deep charcoal/dark navy background, bright teal or green accent colors, clean sans-serif typography, and subtle data-grid or geometric patterns. Use consistent spacing, card shadows, and micro-animations (e.g., fade-in on scroll) throughout the page.

new_feature_requests.summary: Hero/landing section with data analyst branding and tagline
Services section listing full data analyst services (data cleaning, visualization, analysis, reporting, consulting, etc.)
About Me section with bio, skills, and tools/technologies used
Portfolio/Projects section showcasing past data analysis work
Contact form or section for client inquiries
Pricing or packages section for data analyst services
